'''vozavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ataxic|ataxic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-z-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ataxic|ataxic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vozavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozavithi|vozavithi]] || [[word:vozaviji|vozaviji]] || [[word:vozavishi|vozavishi]] || [[word:vozaviki|vozaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozavuthuthu|vozavuthuthu]] || [[word:vozavujuju|vozavujuju]] || [[word:vozavushushu|vozavushushu]] || [[word:vozavukuku|vozavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozavuthu|vozavuthu]] || [[word:vozavuju|vozavuju]] || [[word:vozavushu|vozavushu]] || [[word:vozavuku|vozavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozavufthuf|vozavufthuf]] || [[word:vozavufjuf|vozavufjuf]] || [[word:vozavufshuf|vozavufshuf]] || [[word:vozavufkuf|vozavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozavethe|vozavethe]] || [[word:vozaveje|vozaveje]] || [[word:vozaveshe|vozaveshe]] || [[word:vozaveke|vozaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozavothotho|vozavothotho]] || [[word:vozavojojo|vozavojojo]] || [[word:vozavoshosho|vozavoshosho]] || [[word:vozavokoko|vozavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozavotho|vozavotho]] || [[word:vozavojo|vozavojo]] || [[word:vozavosho|vozavosho]] || [[word:vozavoko|vozavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozavofthof|vozavofthof]] || [[word:vozavofjof|vozavofjof]] || [[word:vozavofshof|vozavofshof]] || [[word:vozavofkof|vozavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozavÃŸfthÃŸf|vozavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vozavÃŸfjÃŸf|vozavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vozavÃŸfshÃŸf|vozavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vozavÃŸfkÃŸf|vozavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vozavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vozavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vozavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vozavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vozavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vozavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vozavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozavÃŸfthÃŸf|vozavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vozavÃŸfjÃŸf|vozavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vozavÃŸfshÃŸf|vozavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vozavÃŸfkÃŸf|vozavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozavÃŸfthÃŸf|vozavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vozavÃŸfjÃŸf|vozavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vozavÃŸfshÃŸf|vozavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vozavÃŸfkÃŸf|vozavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozavÃḊthÃḊ|vozavÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vozavÃḊjÃḊ|vozavÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vozavÃḊshÃḊ|vozavÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vozavÃḊkÃḊ|vozavÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozavathatha|vozavathatha]] || [[word:vozavajaja|vozavajaja]] || [[word:vozavashasha|vozavashasha]] || [[word:vozavakaka|vozavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozavatha|vozavatha]] || [[word:vozavaja|vozavaja]] || [[word:vozavasha|vozavasha]] || [[word:vozavaka|vozavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozavafthaf|vozavafthaf]] || [[word:vozavafjaf|vozavafjaf]] || [[word:vozavafshaf|vozavafshaf]] || [[word:vozavafkaf|vozavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vozavasha|vozavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozavshÃḋasha|vozavshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozavroasha|vozavroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozavmuasha|vozavmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozavyaasha|vozavyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozavnkshÃḋasha|govozavnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozavnkroasha|govozavnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozavnkmuasha|govozavnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozavnkyaasha|govozavnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vozazavasha|vozazavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozazavshÃḋasha|vozazavshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozazavroasha|vozazavroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozazavmuasha|vozazavmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozazavyaasha|vozazavyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozazavnkshÃḋasha|govozazavnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozazavnkroasha|govozazavnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozazavnkmuasha|govozazavnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozazavnkyaasha|govozazavnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vezÃḊvasha|vezÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vezÃḊvshÃḋasha|vezÃḊvshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vezÃḊvroasha|vezÃḊvroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vezÃḊvmuasha|vezÃḊvmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vezÃḊvyaasha|vezÃḊvyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govezÃḊvnkshÃḋasha|govezÃḊvnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govezÃḊvnkroasha|govezÃḊvnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govezÃḊvnkmuasha|govezÃḊvnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govezÃḊvnkyaasha|govezÃḊvnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vozfavasha|vozfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozfavshÃḋasha|vozfavshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozfavroasha|vozfavroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozfavmuasha|vozfavmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozfavyaasha|vozfavyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozfavnkshÃḋasha|govozfavnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozfavnkroasha|govozfavnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozfavnkmuasha|govozfavnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozfavnkyaasha|govozfavnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
